name: Rolling Kids' Desk Chair - Pillowfort™
description:
Make sure your kiddo is comfortable as they sit to study with the Rolling Desk Chair from Pillowfort™. Supported on metal legs, this kids rolling desk chair features casters at the feet that allow for easy movement and rotation in all the directions. Designed with a slightly curved back, it features an upholstered design and a padded seat to maximize their sitting comfort. Plus, the solid hue of the upholstery brings a pop of their favorite color to their room.

Overall Width: 16.125 inches
Overall Height: 31.7 inches
Overall Depth: 20.7 inches
